LanguageData.DO_MilitarisBread_DryMouth.label: dry mouth from hard bread
LanguageData.DO_MilitarisBread_DryMouth.description: A lingering dry-mouth feeling after eating dense hard bread. Eating is a bit slower.
LanguageData.DO_LeavenedBread_WorkFocus.label: energized by white bread
LanguageData.DO_LeavenedBread_WorkFocus.description: Good fermentation and proper baking leave the body warm and focused, improving work speed for a while.
